case_title: GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. VS SETRAVEL INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $503.00 FILED BY GLOBAL ACCESS TRAVEL GROUP INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SETRAVEL INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SETRAVEL INTERNATIONAL $253.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.68 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $305.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SETRAVEL INTERNATIONAL
